# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: ssh-rule
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    description: Allow SSH traffic from any source
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '22'
    sourceRanges:
      - '0.0.0.0/0'

- name: rdp-rule
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    description: Allow RDP traffic from any source
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '3389'
    sourceRanges:
      - '0.0.0.0/0'

- name: http-rule
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    description: Allow HTTP traffic from any source
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '80'
    sourceRanges:
      - '0.0.0.0/0'

- name: https-rule
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    description: Allow HTTPS traffic from any source
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '443'
    sourceRanges:
      - '0.0.0.0/0'
